# externalPurchaseId

**Type**

The unique identifier of an external purchase token.

## Declaration

```swift
string externalPurchaseId
```

## Discussion

Decode an external purchase token to get its [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/externalPurchaseId]. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/StoreKit/receiving-and-decoding-external-purchase-tokens].

## Data types

- **requestIdentifier**: A UUID that uniquely identifies an external purchase report.
- **status**: A string value you provide to indicate the status of the token and the contents of the external purchase report.
